title: Bulbophyllum sarawaketense
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum sarawaketense is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Bulbophyllum, which is the third-largest genus of orchids, with over 2,000 species. Bulbophyllum sarawaketense is native to New Guinea and is often found in tropical regions. The classification of this species is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Dendrobieae. Within this tribe, Bulbophyllum sarawaketense is placed among other species that are known for their unique and diverse growth habits.
